name: Jim | Micro POV (Also Update)
description:
Warning: Micro/Macro, possible feet stuff and vore

Last week and what I'm up to

I've been busy this week and last week with a different project. It's taken a lot of focus but things are calming down now. At the same time, the friend who kindly let me use their image generation bot is no longer doing that now that they're working on a different project. These two factors made me lose focus on this for the moment, but I'm getting help to set the image generation up on my machine so I should be able to get new images to pop on here once that's done. I'm pretty excited make more horny scenarios and characters on here, the only thing holding me back is difficulty in getting the images for them, but that should change soon.

So my plan for now is as follows in priority order:

  1. Aidanverse all-characters size swap alt

  2. Vore bots (requested characters such as the same size sentient fat kobold/dragon and Kangaroo pouch vore)

  3. I have an image for Aidan Goes to the Gym, though I'll probably update it once I'm able to.

  4. I'm going to make ANOTHER Aidan series scenario where, unlike the Jim in this (alternate scenario where Jim bought the Micros instead of Aidan or you.) Jim will be able to as requested, finally get to turn the tables on his captors ;]

  5. More requested macro paws bots, Nick Wilde (or nick wilde-esque) macro, an extremely stompy cartoon-flatten-y bot (in similar style to Hahafunny65), macro femboy

Take the order with a grain of salt. I'm a ball of chaos so I might prioritise different things at different times.

Completed:

  1. ̶I̶ ̶c̶a̶n̶ ̶u̶s̶e̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶ ̶p̶i̶c̶s̶ ̶o̶n̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶ ̶H̶o̶u̶s̶e̶ ̶P̶a̶r̶t̶y̶ ̶D̶e̶s̶c̶r̶i̶p̶t̶i̶o̶n̶ ̶f̶o̶r̶ ̶A̶i̶d̶a̶n̶'̶s̶ ̶f̶r̶i̶e̶n̶d̶s̶,̶ ̶s̶o̶ ̶I̶ ̶c̶a̶n̶ ̶d̶o̶ ̶s̶t̶a̶n̶d̶a̶l̶o̶n̶e̶ ̶v̶e̶r̶s̶i̶o̶n̶s̶ ̶o̶f̶ ̶t̶h̶o̶s̶e̶.̶ Done

  2. I'̶m̶ ̶g̶o̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶t̶o̶ ̶d̶o̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶ ̶a̶l̶t̶e̶r̶n̶a̶t̶e̶ ̶v̶e̶r̶s̶i̶o̶n̶ ̶o̶f̶ ̶H̶o̶u̶s̶e̶ ̶P̶a̶r̶t̶y̶ ̶f̶o̶r̶ ̶t̶h̶a̶t̶ ̶s̶w̶e̶e̶t̶ ̶M̶a̶c̶r̶o̶ ̶P̶O̶V̶. Done

  3. I̶'̶m̶ ̶g̶o̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶t̶o̶ ̶m̶a̶k̶e̶ ̶D̶a̶t̶e̶ ̶w̶i̶t̶h̶ ̶S̶k̶y̶l̶a̶n̶.̶ ̶T̶h̶i̶s̶ ̶r̶e̶a̶l̶l̶y̶ ̶j̶u̶s̶t̶ ̶i̶n̶v̶o̶l̶v̶e̶s̶ ̶g̶e̶t̶t̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶a̶ ̶p̶i̶c̶ ̶f̶o̶r̶ ̶i̶t̶ ̶b̶e̶c̶a̶u̶s̶e̶ ̶o̶t̶h̶e̶r̶w̶i̶s̶e̶ ̶i̶t̶'̶s̶ ̶j̶u̶s̶t̶ ̶a̶ ̶m̶a̶t̶t̶e̶r̶ ̶o̶f̶ ̶c̶h̶a̶n̶g̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶s̶o̶m̶e̶ ̶p̶r̶o̶n̶o̶u̶n̶s̶ ̶a̶n̶d̶ ̶n̶a̶m̶e̶s̶ ̶f̶r̶o̶m̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶ ̶n̶o̶n̶ ̶g̶e̶n̶d̶e̶r̶ ̶s̶w̶i̶t̶c̶h̶e̶d̶ ̶v̶e̶r̶s̶i̶o̶n̶.̶ Done.

PS. I've been anxious about my kinks for over a decade now, I know this is only a little gooner space and I'm just telling a LLM to act like characters I made up, but there's something about putting my kink out there in some fashion and other people being into it that scritches me under the chin like there's no tomorrow.

We don't really know each other but I fucking love you guys for engaging with my goofy ass and Janitorai depicting my weird characters uwu

Anyway, alternate scenario from the original Aidan scenario, yay! Now our cute anxious companion takes the role Aidan had and has acquired yourself and Aidan over the internet. Enjoy!
